content:
✅ Why This Works:
• Prevents students from feeling penalized for taking risks.
• Ensures academic rigor remains intact.

6️⃣ Final Adjustments & Remaining Questions

📜 Integration of All Protocols into Canvas & Weekly Modules

Now that all components are locked in, here’s how they will exist in Canvas:
• Weekly Discussion (Standard OR Extra Credit Option).
• Catharsis Threads (Night & Day Reflections).
• Mastery Exam Option (If Chosen).
• Alternative Text Proposals (Optional).
• Weekly Creative Extra Credit Option.
• Close Readings OR Discussion-Based Assignments (Alternating).
• Final Project Pathway (Student Choice).

📌 Final Questions for Lock-In
1. Do we want to allow students to “pitch” their own Mastery Exam questions for future weeks?
2. Should students have a final “Reflection Letter” at the end of the course where they assess their chosen pathway?
